summary: Search Engine Refactor Stage 2: Context Inheritance - All 5 features VERIFIED. URL parameters (checkIn, checkOut, guests) are correctly passed when clicking listing cards. GostayloCalendar pre-populates dates from URL and displays Price Breakdown immediately with Total to Pay.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent - accessibility improvement (minor, existing from iteration_15)

critical_code_review_comments: getListingUrl() in /app/app/listings/page.js correctly builds URLs with checkIn, checkOut, guests params
useEffect in /app/app/listings/[id]/page.js (lines 56-86) correctly parses URL params and sets dateRange state
Console log '[Context Inheritance] Pre-populating dates from URL:' confirms initialization works
GostayloCalendar initializes currentMonth from value.from when provided (for URL params)
Price calculation triggers immediately via useEffect when dateRange changes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Context Inheritance feature fully verified. Date params flow from listings page to detail page. Calendar auto-initializes with SELECTED_RANGE state.

calendar_pre_populated_from_url.evidence: Calendar trigger text: '20 Jun — 25 Jun (5 nights)' - Console: '[Context Inheritance] Pre-populating dates from URL'

price_breakdown_displayed_immediately.evidence: Price breakdown visible with: Rental cost (5 nights): ฿25,000, Service fee (3%): ฿750

filters_display_in_ui.evidence: Active date filter badge: '20 Jun — 25 Jun(5 nights)', guests badge: '2 guests'

without_url_params_shows_placeholder.evidence: Calendar text without URL params: 'Check-in — Check-out', Price breakdown not shown

console_output_highlights: [Context Inheritance] Pre-populating dates from URL: {checkInParam: 2026-06-20, checkOutParam: 2026-06-25, from: 2026-06-20T00:00:00.000Z, to: 2026-06-25T00:00:00.000Z}
[Context Inheritance] No date params in URL (when navigating without params)
PASS: Calendar pre-populated from URL params on direct navigation

test_1_listings_to_detail_flow.result: All params passed to listing cards, clicking card navigates with params, calendar pre-populates

test_2_direct_navigation.result: Direct navigation works, dates auto-populate, price breakdown shows immediately

test_3_without_params.result: Calendar shows 'Check-in — Check-out' placeholder, no price breakdown (correct behavior)
